title: Config validation rejects valid nested keys
body:
When a settings key contains dots (e.g. `app.database.host`), the validator treats it as a nested path and rejects it if the intermediate keys don't exist.

Expected: flat keys with dots should be accepted as-is.
Actual: `ValidationError: missing key 'app'`.

title: Add bulk import endpoint for settings migration
body: Need a POST /api/settings/import endpoint that accepts a JSON blob of key-value pairs and upserts them all in a single transaction.

title: PUT /api/settings/:key returns 200 on create instead of 201
body: When creating a new setting via PUT, the response status is 200. It should be 201 for new resources per REST conventions.

title: Migrate settings store from file-based to SQLite
body: The file-based JSON store doesn't handle concurrent writes. Switch to SQLite for atomicity.
